summary: Bug fix verification complete - Analysis page fixes VERIFIED. Both bugs fixed: 1) Analysis now shows correct data (3 matches, Mari 3-0 wins, 6-0 games, 100% win rate), 2) Date pickers now close automatically after selection and show selected date text.

minor.issue: CORS error when using date_from and date_to parameters - external API at lev.jsb.mybluehost.me:8001 blocks requests with dates. This is an external API issue, not frontend.

passed_tests: Analysis page loads correctly at /analysis after login
Player 1 dropdown works - can select Mari
Player 2 dropdown works - can select Juan
Analyze button enabled when both players selected
Click Analyze shows correct stats: 3 Partidos Totales
Porcentaje de Victorias shows Mari 100% - Juan 0%
Date picker 'Desde' opens calendar on click
Date picker 'Desde' closes automatically after selecting a date
Date picker 'Desde' shows selected date text (e.g., '15 de febrero de 2026')
Date picker 'Hasta' opens calendar on click
Date picker 'Hasta' closes automatically after selecting a date
Date picker 'Hasta' shows selected date text (e.g., '21 de febrero de 2026')
seed_data_creation: None - using existing external API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified. Analysis page working correctly with player selection and stats display. Date pickers have controlled state and close properly. Note: Date filter API calls may fail due to CORS from external API - frontend handles gracefully with local data calculation fallback.
